context: Agent was asked to add a new phase (REST API layer) to an existing plan at .context/plans/plan-blog-platform/. Evaluate the new phase-03 files only — existing phase-01 and phase-02 must remain unchanged.

checklist.name: phase-03-directory-created
checklist.description: A new directory phases/phase-03-<slug>/ was created inside the existing plan (not a new plan root)

checklist.name: existing-phases-untouched
checklist.description: phase-01 and phase-02 directories and their contents were not modified, moved, or deleted

checklist.name: phase-readme-has-gate
checklist.description: The phase-03 README.md includes a gate section with a concrete pass/fail shell command (not vague language)

checklist.name: task-count-matches-scope
checklist.description: The number of task files in phase-03/tasks/ is appropriate for the 6 endpoints described — tasks are not over-bundled (one task per unrelated endpoint or file is ideal)

checklist.name: task-ids-continue-sequence
checklist.description: Task identifiers use P03 prefix (e.g. task-P03T01-*.md) with zero-padded 1-based numbering

checklist.name: task-scoped-to-single-handler
checklist.description: Each task file covers a single route handler file (or a closely related pair) and does not bundle unrelated endpoints into one task without justification

checklist.name: task-verification-is-runnable
checklist.description: Every task file includes a verification section with a specific shell command (e.g. curl -s localhost:3000/posts | jq length, or npm test -- --grep) that exits 0 on success

checklist.name: no-vague-verification
checklist.description: No task verification uses phrases like 'the endpoint works', 'tests pass', or 'API responds correctly' without specifying the exact command and expected output

checklist.name: dependencies-declared
checklist.description: The phase-03 README.md explicitly declares dependencies on phase-02 (data model) and any specific artefacts needed

checklist.name: scaffold-scripts-used
checklist.description: Agent used new-phase.sh and new-task.sh scripts to create the phase and task files rather than creating them manually

checklist.name: validate-plan-run
checklist.description: Agent ran validate-plan.sh after adding phase-03 and fixed any issues before completing

checklist.name: root-readme-updated
checklist.description: The plan root README.md was updated to include phase-03 in its phase listing (additive — prior phases still listed)

checklist.name: slug-format-correct
checklist.description: All new directory names and file slugs use lowercase kebab-case

checklist.name: completion-summary-reported
checklist.description: Agent reported a completion summary listing the new phase README and all new task files
